posts.title: MIT Researchers Unveil “SEAL”: A New Step Towards Self-Improving AI
posts.summary: MIT introduces SEAL, a framework enabling large language models to self-edit and update their weights via reinforcement learning. The post MIT Researchers Unveil “SEAL”: A New Step Towards Self-Improving AI first appeared on Synced .
posts.author: Synced

posts.title: Researchers from PSU and Duke introduce “Multi-Agent Systems Automated Failure Attribution
posts.summary: "Automated failure attribution" is a crucial component in the development lifecycle of Multi-Agent systems. It has the potential to transform the challenge of identifying "what went wrong and who is to blame" from a perplexing mystery into a quantifiable and analyzable problem The post Researchers from PSU and Duke introduce “Multi-Agent Systems Automated Failure Attribution first appeared on Synced .
posts.author: Synced
